sections.paragraph:
ἀμβλυωπέω impf. ἠμβλυώπουν LXX (Hippocr., X. et al.; Plut., Mor. 53f; PRein II, 113, 9f; 3 Km 12:24i.—PGM 7, 245 ἀμβλυωπός) be dim-sighted (opp. ὀξυωπεῖν Theophr., Sens. 8) in our lit. only fig., ἐν τῇ πίστει see poorly in the things of faith 1 Cl 3:4.—DELG s.v. ἀμβλύς.

impf. impf. = imperfect

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PRein II PRein II = Papyrus Reinach II—List 4

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 52
